title: preload
summary: Link relation type "preload": Refers to a resource that should be loaded early in the processing of the link's context, without blocking rendering.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT

raw_columns.Description: Refers to a resource that should be loaded early in the processing of the link's context, without blocking rendering.
raw_columns.Notes: Additional target attributes establish the detailed fetch properties of the link.
